title: How can I display zero in number column
excerpt: I use Zapier to pass through Shopify data to Monday.com. However every field equals zero doesn’t show 0 in monday’s board. Is there any way to solve this?

posts.author: HarveySun (Yilun Sun)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use Zapier to pass through Shopify data to Monday.com. However every field equals zero doesn’t show 0 in monday’s board. Is there any way to solve this?
